upgrade_source: Wikipedia (Bay Parkway station BMT West End Line); MTA press release (August 2012)
capital_program: American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009 (ARRA)
notes: Three elevators installed: one from NW corner of 86th St and Bay Parkway to mezzanine, one from mezzanine to each platform. Funded by American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009. Station rehabilitated in 2012 with new lighting, platform edges, stair rehabilitation, control area rehab, and platform windscreens. Designated 78th ADA key station in the subway system. Landmark station restored per State Historic Preservation Office requirements.
